name: pathsafe
description: Local-first TypeScript CLI and library for explainable path boundary checks.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js check test/fixtures/root/allowed/file.txt --root test/fixtures/root --allow 'allowed/**' --deny 'blocked/**' && node dist/src/cli.js batch --root test/fixtures/root --input examples/batch.jsonl --json
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
